blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-254 changes. Branch push is complete and synced, but GitHub PR creation/querying is blocked because `gh` is not authenticated and no API token is present in the workspace.

notes: This lane replaces the residual repo-root bigclawctl go-run wrapper with a cached compiled launcher.
The launcher preserves the existing --repo injection behavior for callers that omit it.
The cache location is configurable with BIGCLAWCTL_BIN_DIR and otherwise defaults to ${XDG_CACHE_HOME:-$HOME/.cache}/bigclaw.
Initial push attempts for origin/BIG-GO-254 hit transient LibreSSL SSL_ERROR_SYSCALL failures during HTTPS connection setup to github.com:443.
A retry with HTTP/1.1 completed successfully and published branch BIG-GO-254; use `git rev-parse BIG-GO-254` for the current tip.
GitHub CLI is installed but unauthenticated in this workspace (`gh pr list` returned exit code 4 asking for `gh auth login` or `GH_TOKEN`).
